name: Editorial Hush
description: Luxury editorial. Single subject vertical center, generous negative space, small wordmark, optional small headline bottom-right.
gen_directive: Composition: a single subject occupies the vertical center column, full body in frame, with vast generous negative space (>50% of the canvas should be empty). Subject sits roughly centered horizontally. The top-right and bottom-left quadrants must be unbusy — soft uniform background, clean wall, minimal texture. Monochrome palette: bone, charcoal, ink black, with optional subtle desaturation. High-contrast minimal editorial photography, magazine-spread restraint.
placement_hint: This image was composed to the 'Editorial Hush' template. The headline should sit small in the lower-right area (roughly x=0.62, y=0.62, w=0.33, h=0.20), left-aligned, restrained. font_size_pct around 4-5 (NOT large). No scrim — the negative space is the design; if the chosen region needs scrim to read, the image failed and should be regenerated. Color should be deep ink (#1A1A1A) on a light background, or bone/cream (#F2EDE5) on a dark one. Tracking should feel airy.
